releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### Release Notes

- **Removed Custom Sanitizer**: Replaced the sanitizeTitle wrapper method with the Obsidian API’s built-in normalizePath.
- **UI Updates**: Updated UI labels and titles to follow sentence case.
- **New Release Workflow**: Added automated release workflow.
